description_long: This object is a set of wooden directional signs, consisting of a central post with three arrow-shaped planks pointing in different directions and three smaller standalone signs. The main signpost is robust and cylindrical, with the arrows attached horizontally, each pointing in a distinct direction to guide pedestrians or vehicles. The wood grain is visible, giving the signs a rustic, natural appearance, and the arrows are slightly offset from each other for clarity. The smaller signs include two rectangular boards and two arrow boards, each mounted on short wooden stakes, with some featuring painted or carved symbols or letters. The signs are simple, functional, and designed to be easily visible in outdoor environments such as parks or trails. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for urban or recreational settings.
description: A rustic wooden directional signpost with three arrow planks and three smaller standalone signs, featuring visible wood grain and simple painted markings.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thickness of the central post and the layered arrangement of the arrow planks.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the three main directional arrows and the three smaller signs, with visible painted markings.
description_view_2: A narrow side view highlighting the slim profile of the arrows and the post.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the back of the arrows and the arrangement of the smaller signs, with some text and symbols visible.
attribute_location_context: urban park, trailhead, or pedestrian pathway
